title: BlackboardEntry.payload — sync.db.complete shape
description: JSON Schema for the payload JSONB column when entry_type='report' and subject='sync.db.complete'. Posted by DbSyncWorker (src/will/workers/db_sync_worker.py) via post_report() on a successful sync.db atomic action run. The payload is ActionResult.data from the sync.db action (src/body/atomic/sync_actions/sync_actions.py). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1; ADR-011; DbSyncWorker is the sole emitter. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

symbols_synced.description: Count of symbols synced to the knowledge graph in this cycle. Mirrors the 'scanned' count from the sync action result.

inserted.description: Number of new symbol rows inserted into the DB. Zero on dry runs.

updated.description: Number of existing symbol rows updated. Zero on dry runs.

deleted.description: Number of stale symbol rows deleted. Zero on dry runs.

dry_run.description: True if the sync ran in read-only dry-run mode (no writes). False for a normal write cycle.
